target.label: Fork extension-config pattern + Growth-tier INVARIANTS.fork.md scaffold (FR44 + FR45)

rationale: Documentation-surface substrate story whose ┬¦ Dev Notes ŌåÆ Testing Standards (story v1.2 iter-90 ATDD-skip Change Log row) explicitly defers per-AC automated coverage to Story 1.16-test-runner-landing (Epic 13 scope) + Epic 15a CLI tests (AC 4 runtime enforcement) via hybrid ground-(c) variant-(ii)+(iii) ATDD-skip clause. (a) substrate-verification-covers-ACs: Task 7 authored SIX SMOKES ŌĆö (1) scaffold template shape smoke asserting `packages/keel-invariants/templates/INVARIANTS.fork.md` H1 + ┬¦ Precedence + ┬¦ Fork invariants index + ┬¦ Consumption + ┬¦ Extension (5 sections total) + commented `FORK-<fork-slug>-<category>-<slug>` naming-convention example; (2) rationale doc shape smoke asserting `docs/invariants/fork.md` ┬¦ Overview + ┬¦ ESLint-extend pattern (FR44) + ┬¦ INVARIANTS.fork.md scaffold (FR45) + ┬¦ Precedence + ┬¦ Amendment-vs-fork decision tree + ┬¦ Growth-tier opt-in + ┬¦ Files + ┬¦ Fork extension + ┬¦ Consumption (9 normative sections + H1 + anchor bullet); (3) AGENTS.md update smoke asserting new `## Fork extension (FR44)` H2 section + `@keel/keel-invariants/eslint` subpath-export reference + `amendment` + `decision` keywords present; (4) CLAUDE.md update smoke asserting `INVARIANTS.fork.md` reference + `precedence` keyword present; (5) manifest-load smoke (`@keel/keel-invariants` exports 24 invariants = 22 pre-Story-1.16 + 2 new after `pnpm --filter @keel/keel-invariants build`); (6) sync-gate clean via `pnpm keel-invariants:check` exit 0 silent (Story 1.9 sync-gate walks the 24-entry manifest + verifies 2 new sha256 hashes + 2 new INVARIANTS.md anchors; iter-91 recorded 0.776s wall, 61.2% budget margin under AC 7 <2s). All 6 smokes re-verified LIVE at iter-92 trace-time with byte-identical outputs to iter-91 dev-story record: file hashes `packages/keel-invariants/templates/INVARIANTS.fork.md: 167ba6b2a8f1153df02f7e572b1d1e31415731493b0729415f6573cc1a696218` + `docs/invariants/fork.md: be6f3d8919e7bb2b6258d768895d8a1e4d4a37c5fef95f5121f1ca878da192f2`. (b) no test runner at Story 1.16 time ŌĆö Epic 13 scope; recursive probe for vitest/jest/playwright/cypress configs returns zero matches at iter-92. (c) HYBRID variant-(ii)+(iii): variant (ii) downstream-story-covers-integration ŌĆö Epic 15a's `create-keel-app --include-fork-invariants` CLI flag (default `false` at 1.0 per AC 4) is the runtime consumer + formal integration gate for the auto-template-copy behaviour; `packages/create-keel-app/` does not yet exist at Story 1.16 landing time (verified via `ls packages/` returning `keel-invariants` only at drafting iter-88 L4 audit + re-verified iter-92); AC 4 describes DOWNSTREAM consumer behaviour EXPLICITLY CARVED OUT of Story 1.16 scope (see story ┬¦ AC 4 negative-carve-out lines 48 ŌĆö regression-test mandate pushed to Epic 15a). First-half of AC 3 (scaffold template + CLAUDE.md contract row) is substrate-covered + drift-detected; second-half (fork-operator opts in by copying template) is an operational ACTION that materializes when a fork actually copies the template ŌĆö post-M0 ops + Epic 15a runtime. Variant (iii) spec-declared-CR-substitution ŌĆö ┬¦ Testing Standards 'Adversarial coverage (deferred to CR pass)' subsection affirmatively declares AC 1 + AC 2 + AC 3 + AC 4 adversarial coverage is delegated to `/bmad-code-review (args: "2")` Blind Hunter / Edge Case Hunter / Acceptance Auditor fan-out at iter-94. The deterministic FAIL signal (overall 0% < 80%) is a structural false-positive; no test runner is wired at Story 1.16 substrate stage. **TENTH CUMULATIVE WAIVED PRECEDENT** for contract-only / contract-populator / data-only / emitter+tooling / gate-authoring / configuration-surface / dependency-upgrade-policy-config / documentation-surface substrate stories (Stories 1.7 iter-4 + 1.8 iter-3 + 1.9 iter-3 + 1.10 iter-46 + 1.11 iter-57 + 1.12 iter-64 + 1.13 iter-71 + 1.14 iter-78 + 1.15 iter-85 + 1.16 iter-92). Structural trace-artefact inheritance from Stories 1.11-1.15 (~90% reasoning-cost savings per iter-46/57/64/71/78/85 precedent; mechanical adaptation of 1-15 template to 1.16's 4-AC documentation-surface substrate with fork-extension/INVARIANTS.fork-specific evidence replacing renovate-specific evidence). Story 1.16 ships a NEW SURFACE CLASS vs Story 1.15 (scaffold-template + rationale-doc + knowledge-file edits across 5 surfaces vs 1.15's 1 JSON-config + 1 rationale-doc), but the substrate-authoring + drift-detection + WAIVED-rationale posture is identical. Manifest growth 22 ŌåÆ 24 (+9% vs 1.15's +10%); sync-gate wall-clock 0.776s unchanged-to-within-noise vs iter-86 0.629s baseline (+147ms for +2 entries is O(n+m) walker adding 2 file reads + 2 hash computations; well within the <2s NFR budget). Story 1.16 is the FINAL open story in Epic 1 ŌĆö post-iter-94 `done` triggers iter-95 PR #226 DraftŌåÆOpen + final CI gate + EPIC_DONE halt sequence.
